summary: SnapRoad modular backend restructure verification complete. Tested 41 backend API endpoints across 11 route modules (auth, users, offers, gamification, trips, partners, admin, navigation, social, ai, webhooks). 40/41 tests passed (97.6%). Frontend routes verified: /, /driver, /partner, /admin, /portal/partner, /portal/admin-sr2025secure all load correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 405 Method Not Allowed - endpoint only supports POST. Frontend may be calling wrong HTTP method.

issues: React validateDOMNesting warning: button cannot appear as descendant of button - minor HTML nesting issue

critical_code_review_comments: Backend modular restructure successful - all 11 route modules working correctly
Auth routes (login/signup) for driver, partner, admin all functional
Gamification routes (challenges, leaderboard, badges, XP, driving-score, weekly-recap) working
Partner profile returns business info, locations, and plan as expected
Admin analytics returns chart_data, summary, and top_partners as expected
Gems routes (generate-route, collect, trip-summary) working for gems-on-route feature
All mock data preserved and serving correctly
seed_data_creation: TEST_Modular_Check_1 offer created via bulk upload API test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Modular backend restructure from monolithic server.py (4500 lines) to 11 route modules verified. All API endpoints preserved and functional. Frontend routes all loading. Mock data (in-memory) still in use - Supabase tables not yet created. GET /api/user/car returns 405 but this is by design (POST only). React Router v7 warnings in console are informational only.
mocked_api_note: MOCKED: The entire backend uses in-memory mock data from services/mock_data.py. No database queries. Supabase is configured but tables not created yet.

frontend_ui_tests: /driver route loads with plan selection - OK
